label: Transparent kiwi cross section motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Kiwi transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a kiwi cross-section motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A vine-orchard kiwi cut open in clean cross section, vivid lime-green flesh, pale cream center star, ring of tiny black seeds, fuzzy brown skin edge, and a small vine leaf accent. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, juicy radial texture, unmistakably kiwi.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include one circular slice, one partial whole kiwi edge, and a small vine leaf without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no lime citrus, no cucumber, no avocado, no tropical leaf set, no bowl, no hand, no props, no landscape, no text, no watermark, no second plant species.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Kiwi light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Kiwi", derived from the visible kiwi cross-section cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible playful data UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Kiwi, Kiwi Cross Section, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from lime-green kiwi flesh, seed-black dots, fuzzy brown skin, pale cream center, vine-green leaves, and radial fruit geometry. The board must read as kiwi, not lime citrus or avocado.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, pale flesh surfaces, kiwi-lime primary actions, seed-black tiny chart dots, center-cream accents, vine-green success states, fuzz-brown borders, radial segment texture.
Constraints: no lime citrus identity, no avocado, no cucumber, no generic green monochrome UI, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Kiwi", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Kiwi dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Kiwi". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the kiwi cross-section cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Kiwi, Kiwi Cross Section, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve kiwi system language: lime-green active states, seed-black rhythm, fuzzy brown surfaces and borders, cream text, vine-green controls, radial fruit-segment texture, 8px radius, precise shadcn/tweakcn component grid. Must read as kiwi, not lime citrus or avocado.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep seed-black and fuzz-brown dark surfaces, pale cream foreground, kiwi-lime active states, fruit-green chart highlights, vine green focus/control accents, subtle seed-dot overlays, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no lime citrus identity, no avocado, no cucumber, no neon-green overload, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Kiwi".
